calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ:Irving Pfeffer, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
John E. Wai through his Attorney, Saul M. Ferster.
Leslie H. Kulesh, Defendant present in pro per
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a future judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:765 O'farrell St. #28, SF.
Defendants to vacate the premises at or 5PM on August 31, 2003, plaintiff waives all back rent damages from April 1,2003 to August 31, 2003.
Security deposit to be retain by Plaintiff.
Plaintiff to give a neutral letter of recomendation.
Defendants to leave the premises empty of all property and in broom clean condition.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte application and declaration have judgment entered for Back rent in the amount of $1,400.00 plus per diem damages of $27.56.
Mutual waiver of claims under rent ordinance. Stipulation for entry of judgment signed and filed in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
